name: Rec Loans 360
description_short: Rec Loans 360 is an online marketplace connecting borrowers with a nationwide network of lenders specializing in RV and boat financing for all credit types.
description_long:
Rec Loans 360 operates as a lending marketplace focused exclusively on recreational vehicle and boat financing. The company positions itself as a simplified alternative to traditional RV and boat loan processes, leveraging a network of nationwide lenders rather than originating loans directly. The platform emphasizes speed and accessibility, claiming same-day decisions in most cases through a three-stage online process.

The company offers financing for new and used RVs, boats, and refinancing of existing recreational loans. They explicitly market to borrowers across the credit spectrum—from those with excellent credit to those with challenged credit histories. Services include standard new vehicle loans, used vehicle loans, full-time RVer financing, and refinancing options. They advertise interest rates starting at 6.74% for well-qualified borrowers, with alternative terms available for those with credit challenges.

Rec Loans 360 distinguishes itself by specializing exclusively in recreational lending rather than general personal loans, offering purpose-built products like full-time RVer loans that account for non-traditional income verification. The company claims to pre-qualify applications before distributing them to lenders, positioning this as a protective measure against multiple credit inquiries. Their nationwide lender network reportedly provides flexibility in loan terms, including short-term, long-term, and refinancing options.

The company operates entirely online with no mention of physical locations or phone support structures. While the website promotes competitive rates and fast approvals, actual loan terms, APRs, and approval odds depend on the individual lenders in their network, which are not transparently identified. Like all marketplace lenders, consumer outcomes will vary significantly based on credit profile and the specific lender matched.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 100% online application and approval process with same-day decisions in most cases
Specializes exclusively in RV and boat financing with purpose-built loan products for full-time RVers
Serves borrowers across entire credit spectrum including those with damaged or challenged credit
Offers refinancing options to lower rates, payments, or extend terms on existing RV/boat loans
Claims to pre-qualify applications before sending to lenders to protect credit scores from multiple inquiries
Advertises competitive rates starting at 6.74% APR for well-qualified borrowers
Nationwide lender network provides multiple loan structure options (short-term, long-term, special finance)
cons: Not a direct lender—actual loan terms and approval odds depend on individual lenders in undisclosed network
No transparent information about specific lenders, their approval criteria, or actual average APRs charged
No mention of phone support, customer service channels, or dispute resolution process
Website does not disclose fees, prepayment penalties, or other terms applicants should expect
Claimed credit protection (pre-qualification) is not independently verified and contradicts standard marketplace practice
best_for: Borrowers seeking to finance new or used RVs or boats with online convenience
Full-time RVers or live-in vehicle owners needing specialized loan products with non-traditional income verification
Borrowers with imperfect credit looking for lenders willing to work with challenged credit histories
Existing RV or boat loan holders seeking refinancing to lower rates or adjust terms
diagnosis: Rec Loans 360 is best for borrowers seeking specialized RV or boat financing through an online marketplace model, particularly those with challenged credit or non-traditional income. The main caveat is that this is a marketplace connecting to unseen lenders, so actual loan terms, APRs, and approval odds depend entirely on the lender matched, which creates uncertainty around actual cost and approval likelihood despite marketing claims of competitive rates.
services: Full-time RVer and live-in vehicle loans
RV financing for borrowers with good credit
RV financing for borrowers with bad credit
Boat financing for borrowers with good credit
Boat financing for borrowers with bad credit
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
